CREATE TABLE test_space (id INT, str_value STRING);
INSERT INTO test_space (id, str_value) VALUES (1, space(0));
INSERT INTO test_space (id, str_value) VALUES (2, space(5));
INSERT INTO test_space (id, str_value) VALUES (3, space(10));
SELECT str_value FROM test_space WHERE id = 1;
SELECT str_value FROM test_space WHERE id = 2;
SELECT str_value FROM test_space WHERE id = 3;
SELECT str_value FROM test_space WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_space WHERE str_value = space(5));
SELECT CONCAT('Spaces: ', str_value) AS description FROM test_space WHERE LENGTH(str_value) = 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_of_spaces FROM test_space WHERE str_value = space(0);
SELECT str_value FROM test_space WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_space WHERE str_value = space(10));
SELECT a.name, b.str_value FROM another_table AS a INNER JOIN test_space AS b ON LENGTH(b.str_value) = 5;
SELECT a.name FROM another_table AS a WHERE a.name LIKE 'Test%';
SELECT space(3) AS spaces_example, a.name FROM another_table AS a WHERE LENGTH(a.name) = 7;
